title: Antonio Tejero, leader of failed 1981 coup in Spain, dies at 93
author: Phil Davison
fullText: The revolt inspired fear that Francoist fascism had returned. Mr. Tejero died the same day the Spanish government declassified documents related to the coup.
summary: The revolt inspired fear that Francoist fascism had returned. Mr. Tejero died the same day the Spanish government declassified documents related to the coup.
